questions.question: What is the priority order for loading boot code in the GL3523 hub?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the priority order for loading boot code in the GL3523 hub is that Area 1 has the highest priority, and the boot code will not load the firmware from Area 2 unless Area 1 is a Mask Code.

questions.question: What are the steps involved in the GL3590 hub recovery case?
questions.justification: The synthesis text outlines the steps involved in the GL3590 hub recovery case, including ensuring both areas have firmware, updating the area with the older firmware version, and updating Area 1 when the versions are the same.

questions.question: What are the different types of firmware verification performed for the HP monitor?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes three types of firmware verification: Firmware Verify (high-level verification through the Scaler), Software Verify (low-level verification through tools), and Genesys Verify (hardware-based verification through the GL3590 hub).
